title: jasione minuta
intro: Jasione minuta, also known as small blue eyes or blue eyes, is a type of flowering plant in the bellflower family native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Jasione minuta include its ability to soothe and calm skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Jasione minuta is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use, and has also been used in herbal teas and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
